title: Trump Halts Iran Attack, Vows 'Large Scale Assault' if Talks Fail
summary: Trump cancelled a planned attack on Iran at the request of Gulf states, but warns of potential large-scale assault if peace talks fail.

title: Police Respond to 'Active Shooter' at San Diego Mosque

title: Trump Creates $1.8B "Anti-Weaponization" Fund

title: ICE Agent Charged in Shooting of Venezuelan Immigrant
summary: An ICE agent faces charges for shooting a Venezuelan immigrant in Minnesota, sparking debate over immigration enforcement tactics.

title: Evidence Blocked in UnitedHealthcare CEO Murder Case
